title: ReDoc Configuration Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for ReDoc configuration options. These options control display, behavior, and theming of the rendered API documentation.

fields.name: hideHostname
fields.description: Hide protocol and hostname in operation definitions.

fields.name: hideSchemaTitles
fields.description: Hide schema titles next to types.

fields.name: expandResponses
fields.description: Comma-separated HTTP codes to expand, or 'all'.

fields.name: jsonSamplesExpandLevel
fields.description: Default expand level for JSON samples.

fields.name: onlyRequiredInSamples
fields.description: Show only required fields in request samples.

fields.name: pathInMiddlePanel
fields.description: Show path and HTTP verb in middle panel.

fields.name: untrustedSpec
fields.description: Treat spec as untrusted and sanitize.

fields.name: scrollYOffset
fields.description: Vertical scroll offset for fixed navbars.

fields.name: maxDisplayedEnumValues
fields.description: Max enum values shown before collapse.

fields.name: schemaDefinitionsTagName
fields.description: Tag name for rendering all schemas in sidebar.

fields.name: generatedSamplesMaxDepth
fields.description: Max schema depth for auto-generated samples.

fields.name: downloadUrls
fields.description: Custom download button URLs and labels.

fields.name: typography
fields.description: Font family, size, weight, and line height.

fields.name: sidebar
fields.description: Sidebar width, colors, and item styling.

fields.name: rightPanel
fields.description: Right panel background, width, and text color.
